messages.grace_period: You're in the unlimited submission period! Submit as many times as you'd like until {grace_end_date}. After that, you'll have {max_submissions} submissions. Submissions during this grace period do NOT count against your limit.
messages.approaching_limit: Warning: Only {remaining} submissions remaining! Use them wisely.
messages.results_hidden: You've used {current_count} submissions. Tests are still running, but detailed results are hidden.
messages.over_limit: Submission limit exceeded ({current_count}/{max_submissions}). Your code has been received and tests have run, but results are not shown. Please contact your instructor if you believe this is an error.
